debug_info.goal:
a b : Rat
hb : 0 ≤ b
⊢ a.abs = b ↔ a = b ∨ a = -b

proof:
constructor
  · intro h
    rw [Rat.abs]
    split
    · left; exact h
    · right; exact h
  · intro h
    cases h with
    | inl h => rw [h, Rat.abs]; split <;> rfl
    | inr h => rw [h, Rat.abs, Rat.neg_neg]; split <;> rfl
